title: [PR] fix(editor): account for NFC boundary composition in insert offset
summary:

`Cursor.modifyText` builds `newText = prefix + insert + suffix` and hands it to `Cursor.fromText`, which NFC-normalizes the **whole** string. But the new cursor offset was computed as `startOffset + insertString.normalize('NFC').length`, normalizing the insert **in isolation**:

```ts
st
```

title: [PR] v1.2.0 - Provider Capability Matrix, bounded requests, plugin failure policy
summary:
## v1.2.0 — Provider Capability Matrix

Makes the gateway honest about what each provider can actually do, bounds every
request, and draws a hard line between a plugin that *denies* a request and one
that *breaks*.

Closes #207, #276, #277, #278, #279, #283, #284, #288, #248.
Supersedes #249, #329,

title: [PR] Make chdb-lambda the multi-cloud serverless base (package + template)
summary:
Turns the 2023 chDB-on-Lambda demo into the maintained **base** for running a chDB (in-process ClickHouse) analyst on serverless.

## What changes

- **One app, one image, three clouds.** `src/chdb_serverless/` is the single source of truth (server + agent + init_db); one `Dockerfile` builds an imag
